scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { copyFileSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const src = path.resolve('src/default.rules.yaml'); const destDir = path.resolve('dist'); mkdirSync(destDir, { recursive: true }); copyFileSync(src, path.join(destDir, 'default.rules.yaml'));"
